meaning: n.拍马屁的人,谄媚者,奉承者adj.拍马的,奉承的
examples: A sycophant flatterer is neither a guru or a preacher.
A sycophant (flatterer) is neither a guru or a preacher.
Mr Mugabe, sycophant-surrounded and with his own foreign-currency wallet, is short of neither bread nor baubles, and may do the same.
They do that with the de facto backing of their sycophant constituent governments.
Accentuating the parental role as sycophant is the insane amount of money many spend on training, equipment and travel teams in search of that Holy Scholarship.
